summary: review-v2 ISSUE-3: added automated a11y tests (native focusable export buttons, 44px tap-target class, keyboard-focused activation) to close the automatable portion of the manual UI checklist; restated code-level evidence (semantic tokens, no motion, <pre> text preview, single-column). The irreducibly-visual live checks (light/dark appearance, on-device mobile/wide rendering, focus walk) are recorded as a checklist requiring explicit user sign-off before merge — a headless executor cannot render or visually approve them. ISSUE-1/ISSUE-2 already RESOLVED.
